name: compute_occupancy_ramp
description: Compute the month-by-month occupancy ramp schedule from start to stabilization, with optional RevPAR and room revenue at each stage. Use this to show the financial impact of occupancy recommendations.

start_occupancy.description: Starting occupancy rate (0-1 decimal, e.g., 0.55 for 55%)

ramp_months.description: Months between each occupancy growth step

growth_step.description: Occupancy increment per step (0-1 decimal, e.g., 0.05 for 5%)

adr.description: Optional: ADR to compute RevPAR at each stage

room_count.description: Optional: Room count to compute monthly room revenue
